      Special Feature Highlights
      Brand KORURACLUB

      About this item

      • 【Natural Style】 - KORURACLUB wigs are meticulously designed to create a natural, flowing look. Our pink wig is perfect for any occasion. Whether you're attending Halloween, a cosplay event, or a themed party, this eye-catching cosplay wig will help you show off your unique style and captivate everyone around you.(Note: The package only includes the wig and hairnet; no other accessories are included.)
      • 【High Quality Material】 - Our adorable wigs are made from high-temperature fibers for durability, realistic styling, and long-lasting durability. This anime wig has a silky feel and can be styled with heat tools up to 180°C, allowing you to easily create a variety of looks while maintaining quality. （Warm Tips: The wig may look a bit flat right out of the package. Simply shake it gently a few times or run your fingers through it to bring back its natural volume and shape.）
      • 【Versatile Style】 - This stylish Lolita wig is suitable for all face shapes and is the ideal addition to your wardrobe. Each cosplay wig comes in a variety of vibrant colors, allowing you to easily change your look and become the center of attention at any event. The cute wigs add a touch of flair to your overall look.
      • 【Easy Care】 - Our KORURACLUB wigs are easy to style and maintain, resisting tangles and shedding. Whether you're wearing it everyday or attending a special cosplay event, you can be sure your wig stays in perfect condition. This essential accessory will complete your look and help you achieve the princess charm you've always dreamed of. (Note: The package only includes the wig and hairnet; no other accessories are included.)
      • 【Wearing Tips】 - This wig is made with high-temperature fibers/matte fibers. Before wearing, it's recommended to first test the wig by briefly contacting it with your skin (such as on your wrist or behind your ear). If no redness, itching, or rash occurs after prolonged contact, you can proceed with wearing it. If you experience any discomfort or unusual symptoms after wearing, please discontinue use immediately.

      Important information

      Safety Information

      This wig is made with high-temperature fibers/matte fibers. Before wearing, it's recommended to first test the wig by briefly contacting it with your skin (such as on your wrist or behind your ear). If no redness, itching, or rash occurs after prolonged contact, you can proceed with wearing it. If you experience any discomfort or unusual symptoms after wearing, please discontinue use immediately.

      Directions

      The directions for this wig include: preparing the wig and natural hair, styling techniques, haircare routines, and tips for extending the wig's lifespan.

      Disclaimer: While we work to ensure that product information is correct, on occasion manufacturers may alter their ingredient lists. Actual product packaging and materials may contain more and/or different information than that shown on our Web site. We recommend that you do not solely rely on the information presented and that you always read labels, warnings, and directions before using or consuming a product. For additional information about a product, please contact the manufacturer. You should not use this information as self-diagnosis or for treating a health problem or disease. Contact your health-care provider immediately if you suspect that you have a medical problem. Information and statements regarding dietary supplements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition. Amazon.com assumes no liability for inaccuracies or misstatements about products.

      7. KORURACLUB IS AN ORIGINAL LINGERIEDESIGNER BRAND INSPIRED BY THEMYSTICAL AND SEDUCTIVE REALMSOF ANIME CULTURE. OUR CREATIONSDRAW FROM THE ENCHANTINGWORLDS OF DEMONS, SUCCUBIANGELS,GOTH, DARK, AND PUNKSTYLES, OFFERING A BOLD FUSION FORTHOSE WHO DARE TO EXPRESS THEIRINNER FANTASIES

      8. WHY CHOOSE KORURACLUB PU LINGERIE?

        Safety、Durability And Comfort

        At KORURACLUB, we prioritize your safety with our PU lingerie, made from non-toxic materials that meet international standards.

        Our high-quality PU is treated for enhanced elasticity and wear resistance, featuring a flexible coating to prevent cracking.

        With double-layer reinforcement, our lingerie remains stable during movement.

        Designed for comfort, each piece fits your body curve and allows free movement, providing an unrestrained wearing experience.

        For any concerns, please reach out to us.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      About this Item

      • 【Natural Style】 - KORURACLUB wigs are meticulously designed to create a natural, flowing look. Our pink wig is perfect for any occasion.       Product Description

      【Natural Style】 - KORURACLUB wigs are meticulously designed to create a natural, flowing look. Our pink wig is perfect for any occasion. Whether you're attending Halloween, a cosplay event, or a themed party, this eye-catching cosplay wig will help you show off your unique style and captivate everyone around you. 【High Quality Material】 - Our adorable wigs are made from high-temperature fibers for durability, realistic styling, and long-lasting durability. This anime wig has a silky feel and can be styled with heat tools up to 180°C, allowing you to easily create a variety of looks while maintaining quality. 【Versatile Style】 - This stylish Lolita wig is suitable for all face shapes and is the ideal addition to your wardrobe. Each cosplay wig comes in a variety of vibrant colors, allowing you to easily change your look and become the center of attention at any event. The cute wigs add a touch of flair to your overall look. 【Easy Care】 - Our KORURACLUB wigs are easy to style and maintain, resisting tangles and shedding. Whether you're wearing it everyday or attending a special cosplay event, you can be sure your wig stays in perfect condition. This essential accessory will complete your look and help you achieve the princess charm you've always dreamed of. (Note: The package only includes the wig and hairnet; no other accessories are included.) 【Wearing Tips】 - This wig is made with high-temperature fibers/matte fibers. Before wearing, it's recommended to first test the wig by briefly contacting it with your skin (such as on your wrist or behind your ear). If no redness, itching, or rash occurs after prolonged contact, you can proceed with wearing it. If you experience any discomfort or unusual symptoms after wearing, please discontinue use immediately.

      Important Information

      Safety Information

      This wig is made with high-temperature fibers/matte fibers. Before wearing, it's recommended to first test the wig by briefly contacting it with your skin (such as on your wrist or behind your ear). If no redness, itching, or rash occurs after prolonged contact, you can proceed with wearing it. If you experience any discomfort or unusual symptoms after wearing, please discontinue use immediately.

      Directions

      The directions for this wig include: preparing the wig and natural hair, styling techniques, haircare routines, and tips for extending the wig's lifespan.
